series_metadata.series_description: All documentation related to the application of a school district to participate in an energy conservation (HB 264) program project. The documentation includes, but is not limited to, the materials submitted by the district and any analysis or report done by Commission staff to verify the information submitted in the application.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Following redaction of any priviledged information, seven (7) years from approval of application or converted electronic format. ; Electronic: Following redaction of any priviledged information,seven (7) years from approval of application
